title: lycopodium clavatum f. trilobum
intro: Lycopodium clavatum f. trilobum, also known as the club moss, is a variety of the Lycopodium clavatum plant, which is a type of low-growing, evergreen fern-like plant native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lycopodium clavatum f. trilobum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Lycopodium clavatum f. trilobum is commonly prepared in herbal form as a tincture or dried powder for use in teas and other medicinal preparations.
